# Issue Templates

This directory contains issue templates to help standardize bug reports, feature requests, and documentation issues.

## Available Templates

- **Bug Report** (`bug_report.yml`) - For reporting bugs and unexpected behavior
- **Feature Request** (`feature_request.yml`) - For suggesting new features or enhancements
- **Documentation** (`documentation.yml`) - For reporting documentation issues

## Usage

When creating a new issue, GitHub will present these templates as options. Select the most appropriate template for your issue type.

## Labels

Issues created from templates are automatically tagged with:

- `bug` - Bug reports
- `enhancement` - Feature requests
- `documentation` - Documentation issues
- `needs-triage` - All new issues (removed after initial review)

## Additional Resources

- For questions and discussions, use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/quanticsoul4772/mcp-reasoning/discussions)
- For security issues, use the [Security Advisory](https://github.com/quanticsoul4772/mcp-reasoning/security/advisories/new) form
